CVE-2017-13720.title: In the PatternMatch function in fontfile/fontdir.c in libXfont th ...
CVE-2017-13720.description: In the PatternMatch function in fontfile/fontdir.c in libXfont through 1.5.2 and 2.x before 2.0.2, an attacker with access to an X connection can cause a buffer over-read during pattern matching of fonts, leading to information disclosure or a crash (denial of service). This occurs because '\0' characters are incorrectly skipped in situations involving ? characters.

CVE-2017-13722.title: In the pcfGetProperties function in bitmap/pcfread.c in libXfont  ...
CVE-2017-13722.description: In the pcfGetProperties function in bitmap/pcfread.c in libXfont through 1.5.2 and 2.x before 2.0.2, a missing boundary check (for PCF files) could be used by local attackers authenticated to an Xserver for a buffer over-read, for information disclosure or a crash of the X server.

CVE-2017-16611.title: In libXfont before 1.5.4 and libXfont2 before 2.0.3, a local atta ...
CVE-2017-16611.description: In libXfont before 1.5.4 and libXfont2 before 2.0.3, a local attacker can open (but not read) files on the system as root, triggering tape rewinds, watchdogs, or similar mechanisms that can be triggered by opening files.
